definition: logarithm of the ratio of a given intensity of sound in a stated direction to the reference sound intensity. Such intensity level in decibels is ten times the logarithm to the base ten of the ratio

definition_ml.en: logarithm of the ratio of a given intensity of sound in a stated direction to the reference sound intensity. Such intensity level in decibels is ten times the logarithm to the base ten of the ratio
definition_ml.de: Logarithmus des Verhältnisses zwischen einer gegebenen Schallintensität in einer angegebenen Richtung und der Referenzschallintensität

note: Unless otherwise specified, the reference sound intensity is 1 pW/m².

note_ml.en: Unless otherwise specified, the reference sound intensity is 1 pW/m².
note_ml.de: Wenn nicht anders spezifiziert ist die Referenz-Schallintensität 1 pW/m²
